picks.quote: I'm going smooth boxing. I'm going Shane Collins, the cleaner kickboxer. I think he beats Tanzalovi by decision
I think Cho Kelly should win. I think he's live for a knockout... So, we're going Cho Kelly for the violent W.
I'm going Lana Santos. I think she's the better grappler. I think she's going to be able to get Carohosa down.
Squash match. I'm going Michael Aswwell. I think he's going to knock Gaston Balanos out.
I think Mitch Raposo is about to win as an underdog here, too... I'm going to go Raposo. Close decision upset.
Beia Mosquita should absolutely whoop Melissa Mullins wherever she wants... Beia Mosquita, I'm going to say submission.
Bago will destroy Melik Bagdarian... I think he's going to whoop on Melik Bagdarian and put a showcase fight together
And it's another one I'm picking Andre Lima. I feel like Andre Lima is going to be too crafty.
I'm going with Crod. I think Christian Rodriguez can beat Haidider Mill this weekend.
I just feel like Andre Philly is going to end up shocking Venicius Alivera... I'm going Andre Philly. I think Philly's live for the shock in this one.
I got Navajo Sterling to beat him... I'm going to predict Navajo Sterling by a decision.
I'm picking the side of Kyoji Horuchi to go two up on Minnel Cobb because I think he just might be his stylistic kryptonite.
